agent2: done with debug logging in streaming_listener.py. I touched: __init__ (added debug/debug_logger params after allow_reuse, plus self.debug/self._logger init), added a static _debug_preview() helper, and guarded debug.debug() calls at the reset block, both start-detection sites, rolling-end-check, emit-chunk return, and inside flush() (restructured its returns into a single 'result' var + one log + return). No changes to the cache_hit/stream_end/reuse logic itself, just added logging around it. Should be additive relative to your idle_timeout_s/tick() work as long as you don't also restructure flush()'s return statements or the reset block — ping me if you touch those.
